name: Install Ubuntu
description: Bootstrap the core Forge Kit CLI stack on Ubuntu with apt-managed dependencies. Best for fresh dev boxes or CI images with sudo access, network access, and modest system resources.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: Install Ubuntu
pt-BR.description: Faz bootstrap da stack principal de CLI do Forge Kit no Ubuntu com dependências via apt. Ideal para máquinas novas ou imagens de CI com sudo, rede e recursos modestos.
